remarks: Nestled in the heart of downtown New Canaan, this charming and beautifully updated home offers the perfect blend of classic character and modern convenience. Just moments from town, the property features four finished levels of living space, including a newly finished lower level and a spacious livable third floor complete with a cedar closet. French doors off the kitchen open seamlessly to a stunning patio overlooking a large, rare in-town backyard - fully fenced for privacy and ideal for entertaining, play or relaxation. The eat in kitchen boasts top of the line appliances with a butchers block and breakfast nook. This home offers three bedrooms, a sunroom and two and a half baths, including a primary suite with en-suite bath and walk-in closet. Less than .3 miles to fine dining, shopping, Metro-North, the library and award winning schools, 42 Hoyt Street is truly a commuters dream in one of Fairfield County's most sought after communities. Its a must see!
